name: Audio Border
description: A rounded border that pulses with the music. The bass energy pushes the border toward a pulse colour and brightens it on each beat. It reacts on window borders, OSDs, and popups whenever the audio visualizer is turned on, and stays a plain static frame when it is off.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Audio reactivity
parameters.description: How strongly the border reacts to the bass

parameters.name: Active colour
parameters.description: Border colour when the window is focused

parameters.name: Inactive colour
parameters.description: Border colour when the window is unfocused

parameters.name: Pulse colour
parameters.description: Colour the border pulses toward on a beat
